{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager",
  "description": "J3 is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence over 8 years.&nbsp;J3 has branches in several locations; Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Ensure all financial transactions and records are accurately maintained for J3 Foods and Stores International.
	Ensure timely and accurate preparation of financial statements (monthly, quarterly, annual) for all outlets.
	Ensure accurate reconciliation of inventory transactions (purchases, movements, write-offs) in alignment with accounting standards.
	Collaborate with the warehouse department to validate stock reports and minimize discrepancies between physical and book inventory.
	Review and approve balance sheet reconciliations (bank, inventory, receivables, payables).
	Manage and mentor Account Officers across all distribution outlets.
	Conduct monthly performance reviews and ensure adherence to accounting procedures.
	mplement standardized accounting processes across all locations.
	Resolve complex accounting issues escalated by Account Officers.
	Approve payment vouchers, petty cash, and bank reconciliations.
	Ensure payroll is processed correctly and on time, including accurate deductions and remittances.
	Manage and monitor payment systems to verify incoming payments.
	Oversee cost accounting and ensure proper allocation of expenses.
	Implement cost-saving measures without compromising operational efficiency.
	Monitor trade promotions, discounts, and rebate accounting.
	Validate sales reports and ensure revenue recognition aligns with accounting standards.
	Ensure timely filing of VAT, corporate taxes, and other statutory obligations.
	Stay updated on changes in tax laws affecting FMCG distribution.
	Implement internal controls to prevent fraud and errors.
	Train Account Officers on new accounting processes and policies.
	Prepare financial reports to MD/CEO and General manager.
	Advise the management on investment opportunities and ways to improve profitability.


Salary
N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;midaasconsult@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, contact on WhatsApp via: 09152781100.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "J3 Holdings"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "name": "",
    "value": "196868"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "maxValue": 600000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Finance Manager Job at J3 Holdings




        
    

        
        J3 is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence over 8 years. J3 has branches in several locations; Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure all financial transactions and records are accurately maintained for J3 Foods and Stores International.
	Ensure timely and accurate preparation of financial statements (monthly, quarterly, annual) for all outlets.
	Ensure accurate reconciliation of inventory transactions (purchases, movements, write-offs) in alignment with accounting standards.
	Collaborate with the warehouse department to validate stock reports and minimize discrepancies between physical and book inventory.
	Review and approve balance sheet reconciliations (bank, inventory, receivables, payables).
	Manage and mentor Account Officers across all distribution outlets.
	Conduct monthly performance reviews and ensure adherence to accounting procedures.
	mplement standardized accounting processes across all locations.
	Resolve complex accounting issues escalated by Account Officers.
	Approve payment vouchers, petty cash, and bank reconciliations.
	Ensure payroll is processed correctly and on time, including accurate deductions and remittances.
	Manage and monitor payment systems to verify incoming payments.
	Oversee cost accounting and ensure proper allocation of expenses.
	Implement cost-saving measures without compromising operational efficiency.
	Monitor trade promotions, discounts, and rebate accounting.
	Validate sales reports and ensure revenue recognition aligns with accounting standards.
	Ensure timely filing of VAT, corporate taxes, and other statutory obligations.
	Stay updated on changes in tax laws affecting FMCG distribution.
	Implement internal controls to prevent fraud and errors.
	Train Account Officers on new accounting processes and policies.
	Prepare financial reports to MD/CEO and General manager.
	Advise the management on investment opportunities and ways to improve profitability.


Salary
N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, contact on WhatsApp via: 09152781100.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "J3 is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence for over 8 years.&nbsp;J3 has branches in several locations: Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun states.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager (Operations)

Job Location:&nbsp;Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Branch Managers oversee the operations and business activities of a branch or regional office within a company.
	They are responsible for overall branch performance, customer satisfaction, and employee management.


Responsibilities
They typically have the following duties and responsibilities:


	Oversee all operations within the branch, including sales, customer service, and administrative functions
	Set goals and objectives for the branch and work with team to achieve them
	Develop and implement business strategies to improve operational efficiency and performance
	Ensure adherence to company policies, procedures and legal regulations
	Recruit, train, and supervise branch staff, and conduct performance evaluations
	Manage and resolve customer complaints or issues promptly and professionally
	Monitor and report on branch performance to higher management, including sales results, customer satisfaction, and overall branch activity
	Coordinate with other branches and the company&rsquo;s head office
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with customers and identify new business opportunities
	Manage branch budget and allocate resources efficiently.


Salary
N250,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;midaasconsult@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, contact on WhatsApp 09152781100.",

Branch Manager (Operations) Job at J3 Holdings




        
    

        
        J3 is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence for over 8 years. J3 has branches in several locations: Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun states.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager (Operations)

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Branch Managers oversee the operations and business activities of a branch or regional office within a company.
	They are responsible for overall branch performance, customer satisfaction, and employee management.


Responsibilities
They typically have the following duties and responsibilities:


	Oversee all operations within the branch, including sales, customer service, and administrative functions
	Set goals and objectives for the branch and work with team to achieve them
	Develop and implement business strategies to improve operational efficiency and performance
	Ensure adherence to company policies, procedures and legal regulations
	Recruit, train, and supervise branch staff, and conduct performance evaluations
	Manage and resolve customer complaints or issues promptly and professionally
	Monitor and report on branch performance to higher management, including sales results, customer satisfaction, and overall branch activity
	Coordinate with other branches and the company’s head office
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with customers and identify new business opportunities
	Manage branch budget and allocate resources efficiently.


Salary
N250,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information, contact on WhatsApp 09152781100.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	We are seeking a highly driven and commercially focused Marketing Manager (Real Estate) to lead our Sales and Marketing function.
	This role is the revenue engine of the organization, responsible for driving market penetration, lead generation, brand positioning, and closing high-value property deals.
	If you are strategic, results-oriented, and passionate about real estate growth, this role is for you.

	Develop and execute integrated sales and marketing strategies
	Drive market penetration and business growth across key segments

Market Research &amp; Analysis:

	Develop partnerships with brokers, agents, and corporate organizations

	Ensure strong and consistent brand positioning

	Coordinate sales team activities and property consultants
	Maintain client database and follow-up systems
	Handle client inquiries and ensure excellent customer experience


Performance Monitoring &amp; Reporting:


	Track KPIs including leads, conversions, and ROI
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports
	Provide insights for continuous improvement
	Forecast sales and revenue performance


Public Relations &amp; Reputation Management:

	Handle customer feedback and complaints professionally
	Maintain relationships with investors and stakeholders

	Strategic Planning &amp; Execution
	Sales Leadership &amp; Team Management
	Market Intelligence &amp; Analysis
	Branding &amp; Product Positioning
	Digital Marketing &amp; Lead Generation
	Client Relationship Management
	Revenue Growth Focus
	Commercially Driven (Strong business acumen with focus on profitability, deal closure, and revenue optimization)
	Strong Knowledge in the use of Property Listing Sites (Nigeria Property Centre, PropertyPro, and other platforms).


What We Offer

	Commission and performance-based incentives
	Career growth and development opportunities
	HMO

Marketing and Sales Manager Job at Heritage Dwellings Limited




        
    

        
        Heritage Dwellings Limited - We are a creative and dynamic real estate development companycommitted to delivering premium properties and advisory services across Lagos and key locations in Nigeria. Our clients range from local homeowners to international investors seeking secure, well-documented, and high-yield properties.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing and Sales Manager
Job Location: Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly driven and commercially focused Marketing Manager (Real Estate) to lead our Sales and Marketing function.
	This role is the revenue engine of the organization, responsible for driving market penetration, lead generation, brand positioning, and closing high-value property deals.
	If you are strategic, results-oriented, and passionate about real estate growth, this role is for you.


Key Responsibilities
Sales & Marketing Strategy:


	Develop and execute integrated sales and marketing strategies
	Drive market penetration and business growth across key segments
	Set and achieve revenue targets and KPIs
	Align marketing efforts with business objectives


Market Research & Analysis:


	Conduct real estate market research and feasibility studies
	Analyze demand, supply, pricing trends, and competitor activity
	Identify target clients including diaspora investors, first-time buyers, and corporate clients
	Provide pricing and product positioning insights


Digital Marketing & Property Listing Management:


	Manage listings on platforms such as Nigeria Property Centre, PropertyPro, and other real estate platforms
	Run digital marketing campaigns (social media, SEO, paid ads, email marketing)
	Optimize property visibility to generate qualified leads
	Track and report performance of listing platforms and campaigns


Lead Generation & Business Development:


	Build and manage strong lead pipelines
	Develop partnerships with brokers, agents, and corporate organizations
	Drive referrals, influencer marketing, and strategic collaborations
	Expand market reach locally and internationally


Branding & Product Positioning:


	Develop strong property value propositions
	Manage brand identity and messaging
	Oversee marketing materials (flyers, brochures, digital content)
	Ensure strong and consistent brand positioning


Sales Execution & Client Management:


	Conduct property presentations, negotiations, and deal closures
	Coordinate sales team activities and property consultants
	Maintain client database and follow-up systems
	Handle client inquiries and ensure excellent customer experience


Performance Monitoring & Reporting:


	Track KPIs including leads, conversions, and ROI
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports
	Provide insights for continuous improvement
	Forecast sales and revenue performance


Public Relations & Reputation Management:


	Manage corporate brand reputation
	Handle customer feedback and complaints professionally
	Maintain relationships with investors and stakeholders


Key Competencies


	Strategic Planning & Execution
	Sales Leadership & Team Management
	Market Intelligence & Analysis
	Branding & Product Positioning
	Digital Marketing & Lead Generation
	Client Relationship Management
	Revenue Growth Focus
	Commercially Driven (Strong business acumen with focus on profitability, deal closure, and revenue optimization)
	Strong Knowledge in the use of Property Listing Sites (Nigeria Property Centre, PropertyPro, and other platforms).


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Commission and performance-based incentives
	Career growth and development opportunities
	HMO
	13TH Month Salary.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated Curriculum Vitae to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager / Content Creator",
  "description": "Softnation Homes Ltd is a forward-thinking real estate development, marketing, and consultancy firm, dedicated to delivering luxury land and home solutions that fuse elegance, exclusivity, and strategic value. We exist to raise the bar in property living, optimizing spaces for discerning cosmopolitans who want more than just shelter, they want prestige, comfort, and a sound investment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator

Job Location:&nbsp;Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are a fast-growing real estate marketing firm looking for a creative and confident Social Media Manager who will also serve as the face of our brand.
	This role is ideal for someone who is comfortable on camera, understands content trends, and can create engaging videos that drive visibility and client interest.


Key Responsibilities


	Create engaging video content for Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms
	Appear on camera as the face of the brand
	Manage and grow the company&rsquo;s social media pages
	Develop and execute content strategies
	Showcase properties and promote real estate offerings through content
	Monitor engagement, trends, and performance metrics.


Requirements


	Must have completed tertiary education.
	Must reside in Ajah or its environs (mandatory)
	Proven experience in social media management and content creation
	Strong confidence and presence on camera
	Excellent communication and presentation skills
	Creative mindset with a good understanding of social media trends
	Must have an active social media presence (Instagram/TikTok).


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Salary: From N200,000 monthly
	Opportunity to grow with a fast-paced real estate brand
	Exposure and personal brand growth.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to:&nbsp;anasatianticserviceslimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
Or
Click here to apply online

Note:&nbsp;Only candidates with strong content portfolios and on-camera confidence will be shortlisted.",

Social Media Manager / Content Creator Job at Softnation Homes Limited




        
    

        
        Softnation Homes Ltd is a forward-thinking real estate development, marketing, and consultancy firm, dedicated to delivering luxury land and home solutions that fuse elegance, exclusivity, and strategic value. We exist to raise the bar in property living, optimizing spaces for discerning cosmopolitans who want more than just shelter, they want prestige, comfort, and a sound investment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager / Content Creator

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are a fast-growing real estate marketing firm looking for a creative and confident Social Media Manager who will also serve as the face of our brand.
	This role is ideal for someone who is comfortable on camera, understands content trends, and can create engaging videos that drive visibility and client interest.


Key Responsibilities


	Create engaging video content for Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms
	Appear on camera as the face of the brand
	Manage and grow the company’s social media pages
	Develop and execute content strategies
	Showcase properties and promote real estate offerings through content
	Monitor engagement, trends, and performance metrics.


Requirements


	Must have completed tertiary education.
	Must reside in Ajah or its environs (mandatory)
	Proven experience in social media management and content creation
	Strong confidence and presence on camera
	Excellent communication and presentation skills
	Creative mindset with a good understanding of social media trends
	Must have an active social media presence (Instagram/TikTok).


Compensation & Benefits


	Salary: From N200,000 monthly
	Opportunity to grow with a fast-paced real estate brand
	Exposure and personal brand growth.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
Or
Click here to apply online

Note: Only candidates with strong content portfolios and on-camera confidence will be shortlisted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
